key_evidence_short: Transfer Station scheduling exception; CDL reimbursement; Laborer/Maintenance classification elimination
notes: PDF extracted cleanly (675 lines). No explicit sanitation terminology anywhere. Transfer Station work named in hours-of-work section with different scheduling (any 5 consecutive days excluding Sunday) but no linked job title or duty description. CDL training reimbursement indicates truck-operation roles exist. Laborer/Maintenance classification being eliminated suggests DPW reorganization. Absence of job-description Appendix in extraction suggests need for direct PDF inspection to confirm Appendix exists. Service-structure verification (municipal vs. contractor for Seekonk collection) needed to distinguish sanitation_dpw_bundled from sanitation_contractor scenarios.
